notes.visual_rect: Same heuristics as pdf_extractor._extract_visual_rects (stroke rectangles min 100x30).
notes.llm_arbiter_estimate: If ENABLE_LLM_BOXED_NOTE_ARBITER=true, LLM calls are up to arbiter_ambiguous per block (deterministic ambiguous only).
notes.drawings_no_table_proxy: pages_drawings_no_raw_table = get_drawings() non-empty on page but find_tables returned 0 tables on that page (broad LLM/vision candidate ceiling).
notes.visual_rect_strict: pages_visual_rect_* uses pdf_extractor rules (stroked rect min 100x30); many PDFs use lines without meeting this filter, so counts can be 0 while drawings_no_table is high.
